meaning: n.台卡导航系统(一种双曲线导航系统)
examples: My position has been obtained by Decca.
Decca Recording co., rejecting the Beatles, 1962.
I was with Decca from 1953 to 1960, and I learned more about the business during that time than any other.
Originally a fan-funded project from ArtistShare, Two Shade makes its major-label jump to Decca Records next week.
Labels included under the Universal umbrella are Def Jam, Motown, Decca, Island Records, Interscope Records and Polydor Records.
